name: SC-001: Add to cart changes button to Remove
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, add Sauce Labs Backpack to the cart, and verify the button label changes to 'Remove'.

name: SC-002: Cart page shows item name and price
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, add Sauce Labs Backpack to the cart, navigate to the cart page, and verify 'Sauce Labs Backpack' is listed.

name: SC-003: Remove item restores Add to cart button
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, add Sauce Labs Backpack to the cart and click Remove, and verify the button label is 'Add to cart'.

name: SC-004: Sort by price shows cheapest product first
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select the Price (low to high) sort option, and verify a product with price $7.99 is visible on the page.

name: SC-005: Catalog page loads with product listings
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ using username standard_user and password secret_sauce, then verify the text Sauce Labs Backpack appears on the page.
